nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park
nodes.summary: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Sierra Madre crow
nodes.summary: Sierra Madre crow（Sierra Madre crow，学名 Corvus sierramadrensis），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park
nodes.summary: Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Cream-breasted fruit dove、Rufous hornbill、Rufous paradise flycatcher等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Occurs in a few protected areas like the Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park and Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park ut actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Occurs in a few protected areas like the Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park and Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park ut actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and hunting

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and hunting
